Lifestyle education regarding hypertension23-Apr-2008Essential hypertension (disorder)
  • Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mm[Hg] to reduce cardiovascular risk.
  • Patient will demonstrate understanding and implement recommended lifestyle modifications for hypertension, including dietary changes, physical activity, and sodium reduction.
Diabetes self management plan02-Mar-1988Prediabetes
  • Patient will implement and maintain a diabetes self-management plan to prevent progression of prediabetes.
  • Patient will achieve and maintain a healthy weight to reduce risk of diabetes progression.
  • Patient will maintain blood pressure within target range to support metabolic health.
